name: Apple Cinnamon Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Apple, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease the bottom only of 12 medium muffin cups.
3. Beat the egg slightly, then stir in the remaining ingredients until just moistened.
4. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
5. Bake for 15-17 minutes, or until golden brown.
